text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I'm taking a stroll through the forest,<n>when...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh, heh. I've finally found it! The<n>phantom
mushroom that grows only in<n>this forest!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations! Oh, here, I brought a<n>bag for
you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, uh, thank you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And here are some wet tissues! You<n>can clean
the dirt off your hands with<n>these.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...My, what a wonderful little assistant<n>you are.
But is there a reason you've<n>followed me all the
way here?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Well, I saw you walking around<n>campus, and you
looked tired and a<n>little out of it, so...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I thought maybe there was something<n>I could do
to help... Am I getting in your<n>way?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. In fact, I'm grateful you're<n>here! I
should give you something as<n>thanks.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Please, you don't need to do anything<n>like that!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Modesty may be a virtue, but<n>restraint is not...
You want to become<n>an independent adult, don't
you?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? How did you know that?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Perfect. Then I'll make you a<n>special
concoction from this<n>mushroom.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It will enhance the growth hormones<n>secreted
during sleep, thus helping<n>you become an adult
faster.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um... that sounds very complicated,<n>but... I'm not
sure if it's exactly what<n>I'm looking for...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A healthy body is key to a healthy<n>mind... Why
not try starting with the<n>body first?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, okay!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmph... What terrible timing for a call.<n>Hello?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...The student council has received an<n>
anonymous tip, and they're going to<n>conduct an
inspection of my lab? This<n>is not good.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Yep. Well, that should do it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sky? What brings you here?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, fancy running into you here,<n>Flower.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I was just taking a nap in a field<n>nearby. Wanna
head back together?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Uh, sure!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure Sky was on the phone just<n>now... but
who could she have been<n>calling out here in the
middle of the<n>forest?
